{"response":"Selenium is a Python library for automating browsers. Basic steps: 1) Install with pip install selenium and download a matching WebDriver (e.g., ChromeDriver). 2) Import modules: from selenium import webdriver; from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By; from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait; from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC. 3) Create driver: driver = webdriver.Chrome(executable_path='path/to/chromedriver'). 4) Open page: driver.get('https://example.com'). 5) Locate elements using find_element(By.ID,'...'), By.NAME, By.XPATH, etc. 6) Interact: element.send_keys('text'), element.click(). 7) Use WebDriverWait for dynamic content. 8) Close with driver.quit(). Resources: Real Python modern automation guide, GeeksforGeeks Selenium tutorial, BrowserStack Selenium tutorial, PyQuestHub step‑by‑step guide."}

{"python_shell":{"code":["from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By","from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait","from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC","wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 20)","# ensure we are on login page","driver.get('https://www.instagram.com/accounts/login/')","# accept cookies if button appears","try:","    accept_btn = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.XPATH, \"//button[text()='Accept All']\")))","    accept_btn.click()","except Exception:","    pass","# locate username and password fields by name attributes","email_input = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.NAME, 'email')))", "password_input = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.NAME, 'pass')))", "email_input.clear()","email_input.send_keys('haider_lakhvera')","password_input.clear()","password_input.send_keys('wallahhalal?')","# click the submit button","submit_btn = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.XPATH, \"//button[@type='submit']\")))","submit_btn.click()","# wait for possible navigation or error message","wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.TAG_NAME, 'body')))", "print('Login attempt performed')"],"awaiting_output":true}}
